findings.description: Pattern cancel[ae] captured 'cancelados' (past participle = order status), routing status queries to transactional journey instead of listing cancelled orders.
Field 'steps' in ORDER_ALLOWED_FIELDS without sub-filtering. Real API may populate steps with beneficiaryId, CPF, delivery address.
findings.correction: Define ORDER_STEPS_FIELDS and sub-filter steps in filter_order() before connecting real API

findings.description: sanitize_response_text() and contains_sensitive_data() defined but never called anywhere in the pipeline. False sense of security.
findings.correction: Call sanitize_response_text(response.message) in orchestrator after route() before using LLM

findings.description: LookupError (raised by mock for 404) not caught in router try/except block. Would propagate as unhandled exception causing HTTP 500 without correlation_id.
get_display_label() returned the raw API status string for unknown statuses and for PARTIAL_REFUNDED (null label_completed), exposing technical backend values to users.
findings.correction: Returns 'Status desconhecido' for unknown, 'Status não disponível' for pending-confirmation labels

findings.description: Other transactional patterns may have false positives. 'remov' could capture 'removido'. Recommend word-boundary review for all patterns.
findings.correction: Review remaining patterns with \b word boundaries in next iteration

findings.description: Dead code: _CATALOG_PATH pointing to non-existent fixtures/order_status_catalog.json. Catalog is inline. Creates confusion about data source.
findings.correction: Dead code removed, explicit comment about inline catalog added

findings.description: extract_name imported inside classify() function on every call.
findings.correction: Import moved to top of file

findings.description: ERR-001 returned for missing user_id or session_id with message 'Selecione uma empresa no Espaço RH' — misleading when the issue is expired session.
findings.correction: Requires product decision on message wording

findings.description: test_cpf_not_in_deeplink uses weak OR condition that passes even if CPF is in deeplink alongside 'employees'.
findings.correction: Supplemented with test_deeplink_no_sensitive_ids with precise assertions

findings.description: format_date_ptbr() returns original string on parse failure, potentially exposing malformed data to user.
findings.correction: Return empty string on parse failure

findings.description: docs_url='/docs' enabled. Acceptable for local POC, must be None in production.
innerHTML used with synthetic fixture data escaped via _escText(). Not a real risk in POC — data is static/synthetic.
findings.correction: Use DOM building instead of innerHTML template strings in future refactor

findings.description: ROUTE-015 in ALLOWED_ROUTES catalog but never invoked in router.py. Planned feature not yet implemented.
findings.correction: Implement when beneficiaries feature is needed, or remove if not planned

findings.description: No ruff, mypy, bandit, or coverage configured in dev dependencies.
Empty file (0 bytes) without extension. Likely incomplete test artifact.
3 HTML files exist in 2 copies each (~21MB extra). docs/sample/ and docs/discover/ duplicate docs/cliente/.
.env contains real HML credentials (client_id, client_secret, access_token, refresh_token). NOT committed (verified with git check-ignore). Recommend rotating tokens after Discovery.
Documents 07-11 missing in discover3/. Gap from 06 to 12 is intentional but may confuse new team members.
